title: Predictive Analytics in League of Legends: Map Objectives vs Economy
description: Analyzed a huge dataset of professional League of Legends matches to determine if controlling map objectives (Barons, Dragons, etc) statistically outweighs gold advantages. Engineered an end-to-end data pipeline featuring EDA, permutation testing, and an optimized Random Forest classifier.

title: Computer Vision Geolocation
description: Engineered a ResNet-18 computer vision pipeline to classify Southern California cities from Google Street View Imagery. Utilizes deep learning, batch normalization, and other data augmentation techniques.

title: Grocery Expository Visualization
description: Designed an Kernel Density Estimation area plot analyzing 50,000+ grocery items to communicate the disparity in food processing levels. The graphic argues how industrial food systems prioritize ultra-processed products over lower processed alternatives.

title: Bikewatching: Geospatial Visualization Platform
description: Developed an interactive geospatial visualization to analyze bike-sharing trends, station density, and flow of traffic. Integrated live API data with MapBox GL JS, identifying high-traffic stations.
